ElObsWordUpdater.title: ELOBS Word Updater
ElObsWordUpdater.description: Extension: Upload a Word template and populate it with study data from OpenStudyBuilder.
ElObsWordUpdater.study_required: Select a study by ID or acronym
ElObsWordUpdater.template_hint: Upload a .docx file containing SB_* content controls
ElObsWordUpdater.error_message: An error occurred while generating the document.
